steps.title: Connect action and result
steps.content: John Lee served in the US Civil War, and that service earned him a place in history as one of the war's few Chinese-born American soldiers.

steps.title: Reject weak transitions
steps.content: Choice B signals an example, but no broader claim needs an example. Choice C signals dismissal or concession. Choice D signals a usual pattern, which does not fit a specific historical result.

steps.title: Choose by doing that
steps.content: In doing so shows that Lee earned historical recognition through the act just described: serving in the 2nd Louisiana Infantry. The answer is A.
